channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Greek fire: The Byzantine incendiary weapon that shaped naval warfare
item.description: Greek fire, a mysterious incendiary weapon used by the Byzantine Empire from the 7th century, was a game-changer in naval battles. This combustible liquid, sprayed through bronze tubes on warships, ad...

item.title: Military heightens security in BARMM areas amid grenade attacks and election concerns
item.description: The Philippine military has placed troops in Maguindanao del Norte and Maguindanao del Sur on heightened alert following two grenade attacks that wounded two soldiers and three civilians. The Commissi...

item.title: Minister's legal battle intensifies as court proceedings continue
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing legal challenges faced by a senior minister who is currently under investigation for alleged misconduct. The court case has sparked widespread public debate, with sup...

item.title: Spain secures second FIFA World Cup triumph with Ferran Torres' decisive goal against Argentina
item.description: Spain emerged victorious in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final, defeating Argentina 1-0 in a tightly contested match. Ferran Torres scored the winning goal in the 106th minute, marking Spain's second World...

item.title: Spain clinch FIFA World Cup 2026 with extra-time victory over 10-man Argentina
item.description: Spain secured their second FIFA World Cup title by defeating 10-man Argentina 1-0 in extra time at the New York New Jersey Stadium on July 19, 2026. The decisive goal came from substitute Ferran Torre...

item.title: Nigeria Condemns Xenophobic Attacks In South Africa, Calls For Regional Unity
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has strongly condemned xenophobic attacks in South Africa, urging African leaders to unite against the intolerance. He highlighted Nigeria's evacuation of over 1490 citizens from...

item.title: Tips for Preventing Mold and Mildew in Summer
item.description: The article provides practical advice on preventing and protecting against mold and mildew, particularly during Canada's humid summers. It emphasizes that mold thrives in damp environments and highlig...

item.title: Athlete's fear of safety prompts anti-doping test amid surprise home inspection
item.description: An athlete has undergone an anti-doping test following concerns about her personal safety when doping control officers unexpectedly visited her home. The incident highlights the tension between anti-d...

item.title: Philippine Exorcist School Combines Faith and Therapy
item.description: The article discusses the Michael Center for Spiritual Liberation and Exorcism in the Philippines, a facility where exorcists receive training to address spiritual conflicts. It highlights the interse...

item.title: Cast of 'Blood vs Duty' explores family versus duty dilemma
item.description: The cast of the Philippine television series 'Blood vs Duty' recently engaged in a candid discussion about the central conflict of their storyline, which revolves around the tension between familial o...

item.title: Nigerian children face malnutrition crisis linked to Iranian war and economic strain
item.description: The article highlights how the Iranian war's economic fallout is worsening malnutrition and poverty in Nigeria, particularly affecting children. Rising fuel prices from the conflict have led to higher...

item.title: Spain wins second World Cup after thrilling final against Argentina
item.description: Spanish fans celebrated wildly across Madrid after their team secured a historic second FIFA World Cup title with a dramatic victory over Argentina. The match, held in Lusail Stadium, saw Spain overco...

item.title: Antonelli Secures F1 Title Lead with Belgian Grand Prix Victory
item.description: Kimi Antonelli claimed a dominant victory at the Belgian Grand Prix, extending his lead in the Formula 1 championship. The 19-year-old Italian overcame challenges from Charles Leclerc and a troubled r...

item.title: Gibbons and Grove claim Amashova titles as event marks 40th anniversary
item.description: Ryan Gibbons and S'annara Grove secured victory in the men's and women's elite categories at the 40th edition of the Amashova Classic, a 106km race from Pietermaritzburg to Durban. Gibbons, returning ...

item.title: NGX Group CEO outlines key sectors for Nigeria's economic growth
item.description: Temi Popoola, CEO of NGX Group, has highlighted artificial intelligence, energy, and agriculture as critical sectors for Nigeria's future economic growth. He emphasized that these areas are essential ...

item.title: Experts urge compassionate communication when delivering tragic news to reduce psychological and health risks
item.description: Mental health specialists and medical professionals are warning that the way tragic news is communicated can have a major impact on a person's emotional and physical wellbeing. According to the report...

item.title: Spain clinch World Cup triumph with extra-time victory over Argentina
item.description: In a dramatic World Cup final at the MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, Spain secured their second title after a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Argentina. Ferran Torres, a late substitute, scored the decisi...

item.title: U.S. Troop Death in Israel-Hamas Conflict as Israel Warns of Iranian Attacks
item.description: The article highlights the escalating tensions in the Israel-Hamas conflict, with the U.S. military confirming the death of a troop in the region. Israel has issued warnings that Iran is preparing att...

item.title: Antonelli Claims Victory in Thrilling Belgian GP as Teammate Retires
item.description: Kimi Antonelli secured a decisive victory at the Belgian Grand Prix, marking a significant step toward championship glory. His win came amid dramatic circumstances, with teammate George Russell retiri...

item.title: ACT Paramedics Equip with Advanced Training Room to Tackle Workplace Violence
item.description: The ACT Ambulance Service has introduced a cutting-edge immersive simulation environment called BLISS to better prepare paramedics for unpredictable and violent frontline incidents. This facility tran...
